/usr/bin/c++  -fno-operator-names -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--enable-new-dtags  "CMakeFiles/kde-quicklook.dir/kde-quicklook_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kde-quicklook.dir/quicklook.cpp.o" -o ../bin/kde-quicklook  /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libKF6KIOCore.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib64/libKF6I18n.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib64/libpoppler-qt6.so /usr/lib64/libpoppler.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib64/libQt6DBus.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
